positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a majestic howling wolf silhouette against a vibrant, watercolor nebula background. The wolf should be perfectly centered and positioned dynamically, creating a strong, recognizable contour. Use deep sapphire blue, cosmic purple, and emerald green for the nebula backdrop, with the wolf rendered in crisp, solid black ink lines, maintaining high contrast suitable for screen printing. The style should be blend of modern graphic design and mystical botanical etching, highly detailed but clean. Central composition, symmetry, vibrant color saturation, flat graphic design feel. Isolated on a solid, implied background space for apparel printing.
